hero.headline: Science meets society, in the places you already go.
hero.subhead: We bring cutting-edge research from ETH Zurich and UZH into bars, cafés and public spaces. No jargon. No academic distance. Just real questions and room to think.

howPopWorks.title: Conversation-first science, built for real life

howPopWorks.card2Body: Young scientists from ETH and UZH.
howPopWorks.card3Body: No panel, no podium. The floor is everyone's.

newsletter.subhead: Early access to events, bold questions, no spam.
newsletter.success: Thanks for stepping into the conversation.

about.title: about POP
about.para1:
Science shapes our world.
Most people are not part of the conversation.
We change that.
about.para2: POP Impact Lab translates complex research into public dialogue. We bring cutting-edge topics into spaces where people already meet. No jargon. No intellectual performance. No academic distance. Just real questions. And room to think. We work with young researchers from ETH Zurich and UZH who want their work to matter beyond academia. Because knowledge should not stay behind closed doors. The public deserves access to the ideas that shape their future.
about.teamSubtitle: Three minds. One mission: open science to society.
about.teamMotto: Three women, different cultures, one shared refusal: letting the science that shapes our future stay out of reach.
